description: tests/integration/daemon/repl_e2e.rs often uses 3 nodes + long timeouts even when 2 would cover the scenario. Audit tests and drop to 2 nodes where quorum isn't needed, and tighten timeouts based on fast-test settings.
title: Reduce repl_e2e node count/timeouts where 2 nodes suffice

description:
**Problem**
`crates/beads-rs/src/test_harness/mod.rs` is a 1.6k-line daemon/repl/WAL/network simulation harness that currently lives under the assembly crate even though its consumers are not assembly internals. The audit for `beads-rs-gou3.7.3` shows that `crates/beads-rs/tests/e2e.rs` is the only consumer of `beads_rs::test_harness`, so this surface should move to the daemon-owned testkit instead of keeping a broad subsystem harness under `beads-rs`.

**Why It Matters**
As long as the e2e harness lives under `beads-rs`, opening the assembly crate still drags in daemon runtime/store/WAL/repl concerns and weakens local reasoning about crate ownership.

**Design**
- Move the reusable e2e support types from `crates/beads-rs/src/test_harness/mod.rs` into `crates/beads-daemon/src/testkit/e2e.rs` (or equivalent daemon-owned testkit surface).
- Expose only the e2e support that `crates/beads-rs/tests/e2e.rs` actually needs: `TestWorld`, `TestNode`, `NodeOptions`, `ReplicationRig`, `Direction`, `NetworkProfile`, `latency_budget_ms`, `replication_latency_budget_ms`, `measure_latency`.
- Update `crates/beads-rs/tests/e2e.rs` to import the lower crate directly.
- Prefer deleting `beads-rs::test_harness` entirely rather than leaving a compat re-export seam.

**Files To Study**
- `crates/beads-rs/src/test_harness/mod.rs`
- `crates/beads-rs/tests/e2e.rs`
- `crates/beads-daemon/src/testkit/mod.rs`
- `crates/beads-daemon/src/lib.rs`

**Acceptance**
- [ ] `crates/beads-rs/tests/e2e.rs` no longer imports `beads_rs::test_harness::*`
- [ ] The moved harness lives under `beads-daemon` testkit ownership
- [ ] `beads-rs` no longer exposes the broad subsystem test harness surface
- [ ] `cargo test -p beads-rs --features e2e-tests --test e2e` passes
- [ ] relevant daemon package checks pass after the move
title: Move e2e harness from beads-rs into beads-daemon testkit
